allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"messages":[{"id":"u1","role":"user","parts":[{"type":"text","text":"hello"}]}]}' --max-time 60 -o /tmp/chat-response.bin -w "HTTP %{http_code} | TTFB %{time_starttransfer}s | Total %{time_total}s | Size %{size_download}B | Content-Type %{content_type}\\n")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/demo-chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"messages":[{"id":"u1","role":"user","parts":[{"type":"text","text":"Say hi in 5 words"}]}]}' --max-time 60 -o /tmp/demo.bin -w "HTTP %{http_code} | TTFB %{time_starttransfer}s | Size %{size_download}B\\n")
